name: Maple-Frosted Golden Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add 3/4 cup of the milk and the shortening. Beat for 2 minutes on medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add the remaining milk, eggs, and vanilla. Beat for another 2 minutes.
4. Pour the batter into 2 greased and floured 8 x 1-1/2 inch round baking pans.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes. Cool for 5 minutes; remove from pans.
6. When cool, fill and frost with Maple Frosting.
Maple Frosting:
In a saucepan, cook 1 1/4 cups pure maple syrup to soft ball stage (238°F). Gradually add the hot maple syrup to 2 stiffly beaten egg whites, beating constantly with an electric mixer. Stir in 1/4 cup sifted powdered sugar and beat until well blended.
